findings.title: Houthis warn of Red Sea intervention if escalation against Iran continues
findings.summary: Iran-backed Houthis issued a military intervention warning if regional states ally with US/Israel against Iran or Red Sea used for hostile ops. This escalates I1 rhetoric intensity amid Iran tensions. Direction: escalating.
findings.claim_excerpt: Houthis will intervene if regional countries ally with US/Israel against Iran, Red Sea used for hostile ops, or escalation against Iran continues.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Heightens risk of Red Sea chokepoint disruption, linking Yemen to broader Iran-US-Israel tensions.
findings.confidence_basis: Multiple corroborating reports from tier 1/2 sources on Houthi threats.

sources_cited.excerpt: Houthis issued warning amid heightened tensions in Bab al-Mandeb.
Houthis fired anti-ship missiles at US vessels previously.

search_queries_run: Iran regional tensions Red Sea Houthi threats April 2026
research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Tier 1 institutional tracker confirms rhetoric with context from prior attacks.

cross_monitor_relevance.gmm: Red Sea trade disruption impacts global commodities.

findings.review_reason: Potential linkage to broader Middle East escalation.

findings.title: Israeli strikes intensify in southern Lebanon amid Hezbollah clashes
findings.summary: Israel conducted fresh strikes targeting multiple locations up to Litani River in southern Lebanon. Escalates I2 military posture in Iran-linked fronts. Direction: escalating.
findings.claim_excerpt: Israeli strikes targeted multiple locations amid clashes with Hezbollah; plumes of smoke across southern Lebanon.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Expands ground operations, signaling broader regional confrontation.
findings.confidence_basis: Single real-time OSINT source; needs tier 1 confirmation.

sources_cited.excerpt: Fresh Israeli strikes to Litani amid Hezbollah clashes.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Visual confirmation via video but lacks institutional verification.

findings.review_reason: Ongoing Lebanon front tied to Iran proxy dynamics.

findings.title: Over 2 million displaced in Gaza amid ongoing conflict and aid dependence
findings.summary: Gaza conflict has displaced over 2 million, with population trapped and fully aid-dependent. Accelerates I6 displacement velocity. Direction: escalating.
findings.claim_excerpt: Over 70,000 killed and over 2 million displaced in Gaza since Oct 2023.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Humanitarian crisis at peak, no safe zones available.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: UN-affiliated data aligns with Statista overview.

findings.title: Sudan economic and food systems collapse drives widespread hunger
findings.summary: Sudan civil war causes total collapse of economic, health, food systems with widespread hunger and limited humanitarian access. Escalates I6 displacement velocity. Direction: escalating.
findings.claim_excerpt: Economic, health and food systems collapsed; widespread hunger and disease.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Highest civilian toll risk, access barriers worsen trajectory.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Tier 1 sources consistent on crisis depth.

findings.review_reason: Under-covered theatre with accelerating humanitarian signals.

findings.title: Eastern DRC conflict persists with Hutu militias and Rwanda tensions
findings.summary: Ongoing eastern DRC violence involves FDLR Hutu militias, with Rwanda seeking to limit their power since 2003. Maintains I2 military posture. Direction: stable.
findings.claim_excerpt: Hutu militias active in eastern DRC; Rwanda limits FDLR power.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Protracted low-intensity conflict with cross-border risks.
findings.confidence_basis: Single detailed source; aligns with historical patterns.

sources_cited.excerpt: Roots in Congo Wars, FDLR active.

findings.review_reason: Under-covered; check for Rwanda proxy escalation.
